data.title: Update classifier-tier-output.md contract with overlay fields
data.description:
## Description
Update the classifier contract document to include the two new boolean overlay fields.

### Changes
1. Add security_overlay (boolean) and performance_overlay (boolean) to the Schema table
2. Update the Example JSON to include both new fields
3. Add note in Versioning section that this is an additive (backward-compatible) change

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/classifier-tier-output.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Contract document contains security_overlay field definition
  Verify: grep -q "security_overlay" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/classifier-tier-output.md
- [ ] Contract document contains performance_overlay field definition
  Verify: grep -q "performance_overlay" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/classifier-tier-output.md
- [ ] Example JSON includes both new fields
  Verify: grep -A 20 "Example" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/classifier-tier-output.md | grep -q "security_overlay"
